text: Living a healthy life involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives you energy and helps your body work properly. However, regular exercise is also essential—even a thirty-minute walk each day can improve your fitness. Getting enough sleep, typically seven to nine hours, allows your body to recover and your mind to rest. Don't forget about mental health: managing stress through hobbies or relaxation is just as important. Finally, try to maintain a good work-life balance. Taking breaks and spending time with loved ones prevents burnout and keeps you happy and healthy.
